name: io.github.apatilgtn/k8scortex-mcp
description: Production-grade MCP server for Kubernetes — 75 tools across GKE, AKS, EKS, OpenShift and Minikube with RBAC, audit logging, GitOps (ArgoCD + Flux), and multi-cluster support.

environmentVariables.name: KUBECONFIG
environmentVariables.description: Path to your kubeconfig file. Defaults to ~/.kube/config if not set.

environmentVariables.name: DISABLE_AUTH
environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to disable JWT authentication (recommended for local use).
